questions.q: What is the real name of the author known as Freida McFadden, famous for "The Housemaid"?
Which of the following actors is NOT listed in the cast of Brad Bird's upcoming animated film 'Ray Gun'?
questions.correctText: Denzel Washington is not listed as part of the cast for 'Ray Gun'.

questions.q: Due to increased demand following the FDA's removal of black box warnings, what medication used for hormone replacement therapy is currently experiencing national shortages, leading to patient scrambles?
questions.correctText: Estrogen patches are facing shortages due to a surge in demand after the FDA removed black box warnings, making them harder for patients to obtain.

questions.q: Which of the following is a promising new vaccine candidate for Lyme disease that has completed Phase 3 clinical trials?
questions.correctText: PF-07307405, also known as VLA15, is a Lyme disease vaccine candidate that has completed Phase 3 trials and shown strong efficacy.

questions.q: Connor McDavid recently had a standout performance, recording a five-point night. How many goals did he score in that game?
Which NFL team does Connor McDavid captain?

A recent CDC report, delayed in publication, indicated that the COVID-19 vaccine reduced the likelihood of emergency department and urgent care visits by approximately what percentage in healthy adults between September and December of last year?
questions.correctText: The report found a 50% reduction in emergency department and urgent care visits for healthy adults who received the vaccine.

questions.q: The U.S. Department of Justice has opened an investigation into the NFL's media deals. What is the primary focus of this investigation?
Which new Castlevania game, set in 1499 Paris, was revealed with a gameplay trailer during the Triple-i Initiative Showcase?
questions.correctText: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse is set to launch in 2026 and features combat against corrupted historical figures like Joan of Arc.

questions.q: The creators of the popular Minecraft mod 'Create' have been hired by which upcoming game studio?
questions.correctText: The developers behind the extensive Minecraft 'Create' mod have been hired by Hytale, suggesting a focus on automation and complex systems in the upcoming game.
